---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Katrine Bovién Gørlitz"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(snakecase)
#| include: false
```

##Importing new data 
# Find function: Ctrl + shift + p
#New code block: Ctrl + ALt + i
#New pipe: Cmd + shift m 
#This data is written in pascal case (CollectionDatetime), we change it to snake case, which is where all words are written in lower case with words devided by a lowercase (and we therefore we added "library(snakecase)" in the code chunk above, and ", name_repair = to_snake_case)
#Insert "Help" section by inserting "?read_csv" in the console. You just use it when you need help, and it therefore should not be a part 
```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886626/HR.csv.gz") |> 
  read_csv(show_col_types = FALSE,
           name_repair = to_snake_case, 
           n_max = 100)
```


```{r}
# Code chunk
```
